input.title: Replace with content title or signal title.
input.content_summary: Replace with the content, signal summary, or generated insight to evaluate.
source_refs: Replace with source URL, signal ID, file path, or human note reference.
claims_or_framing: Replace with the main claim, framing, analogy, headline, or visual takeaway being judged.

expected.notes: Replace with the human-owned reason this case belongs in the calibration set.
